zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle Courtenay於1278年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Hugh Courtenay I29歲，母親Eleanor Despencer27歲。她於大約1302年與William de la Lee在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年5月10日在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle Courtenay于1278年出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，她的父亲Hugh Courtenay I29岁，母亲Eleanor Despencer27岁。她于大约1302年与William de la Lee在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1325年5月10日在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle Courtenay was born in 1278, in Okehampton, Devon, England, her father, Hugh Courtenay I, was 29 and her mother, Eleanor Despencer, was 27. She married William de la Lee about 1302, in Standish, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 10 May 1325, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle Courtenay est née en 1278, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Despencer, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William de la Lee environ 1302, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1325, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle Courtenay 1278 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Courtenay I 29 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Despencer 27. Sie hat um 1302 in Standish, Lancashire, England William de la Lee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1325 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle Courtenay è nata il nel 1278 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, sua padre, Hugh Courtenay I, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Despencer, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William de la Lee circa 1302, nel Standish, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 maggio 1325, nel Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle Courtenayが1278年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay Iは29歳，母Eleanor Despencerは27歳であった。約1302年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでWilliam de la Leeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年5月10日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle Courtenay(이)가 1278년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay I(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Despencer(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1302년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 William de la Lee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle Courtenay nasceu em 1278, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Despencer, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William de la Lee aproximadamente 1302, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1325, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle Courtenay родилась в 1278 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Despencer, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de la Lee около 1302 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 мая 1325 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
